summary: P0 Navigation Fix (5 new pages) and P0 Failure UX Fix (allowed_actions from backend) — ALL VERIFIED. 20/20 backend tests passed. All 5 navigation pages load correctly with distinct data-testid attributes. Tool card navigation works correctly.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - MySpacePage uses /api/reels/my-reels but actual endpoint is /api/convert/user-reels. MySpacePage handles this gracefully with Promise.allSettled.

action_items: MINOR: Update MySpacePage.js to use /api/convert/user-reels instead of /api/reels/my-reels (line 131) - currently handled gracefully but should be fixed for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: story_engine_routes.py: _resolve_allowed_actions function at lines 98-186 correctly determines allowed_actions based on job state
story_engine_routes.py: GET /status/{job_id} returns allowed_actions, recovery_state, resume_supported, next_best_action, fallback_in_use at line 764
story_engine_routes.py: READY job returns allowed_actions=['watch', 'download', 'share', 'remix', 'continue'] at lines 107-114
story_engine_routes.py: FAILED job returns allowed_actions=['retry', 'start_over'] based on checkpoint availability at lines 141-154
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Failure panel at lines 1507-1540 uses job?.allowed_actions to render buttons
ProgressiveGeneration.js: Explore While You Wait cards at lines 705-710 correctly point to 5 distinct routes
App.js: Routes for 5 new pages at lines 203-208 (/app/my-space, /app/create, /app/browse, /app/characters, /app/dashboard)
MySpacePage.js: data-testid='my-space-page' at line 219, stats row, filters, search, content grid
CreatePage.js: data-testid='create-page' at line 80, tool grid with 4 tool cards routing to correct pages
BrowsePage.js: data-testid='browse-page' at line 96, tabs (Trending, New, Featured), search, content grid
CharactersPage.js: data-testid='characters-page' at line 215, character grid, create character button
UserDashboardPage.js: data-testid='user-dashboard-page' at line 113, stats cards, activity feed

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 pages verified, all tool card navigations work)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users and known story_engine job
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Navigation Fix and P0 Failure UX Fix fully verified in iteration 392. Key findings: 1) All 5 navigation pages load correctly: My Space (/app/my-space), Create (/app/create), Browse (/app/browse), Characters (/app/characters), Dashboard (/app/dashboard); 2) Each page has distinct data-testid (my-space-page, create-page, browse-page, characters-page, user-dashboard-page); 3) Backend GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns allowed_actions, recovery_state, resume_supported, next_best_action, fallback_in_use fields; 4) For READY job, allowed_actions=['watch', 'download', 'share', 'remix', 'continue']; 5) For FAILED job, allowed_actions includes 'retry' and/or 'start_over' based on checkpoint availability; 6) Tool cards on Create page navigate correctly: Story to Video → /app/story-video-studio, Photo to Comic → /app/comic-storybook, AI Reels → /app/reel-generator, Kids Story → /app/bedtime-story-builder; 7) Explore While You Wait cards in ProgressiveGeneration.js point to correct routes; 8) StoryVideoPipeline.js failure panel uses allowed_actions from backend to render buttons.

browse_page_loads.details: /app/browse loads with data-testid='browse-page', tabs, search, content grid

dashboard_page_loads.details: /app/dashboard loads with data-testid='user-dashboard-page', stats, activity feed

tool_card_photo_to_comic_navigation.details: Photo to Comic card navigates to /app/comic-storybook
